name: Frosted Lemon Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the bottom of a square dish, 10 X 6 X 1/2 inch.
2. Mix margarine, sugar, milk, lemon peel, and egg in a medium bowl. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt. Spread evenly in the dish.
3. Microwave uncovered on high for 3 to 4 minutes, rotating the dish halfway after 2 minutes. Stop cooking when no longer doughy; allow to cool.
4. Frost with Lemon Frosting. Cut into about 2 X 1-1/2-inch bars. (18 bars, 130 calories per bar)
Lemon Frosting:
Beat all ingredients until smooth.
